mapper.sql: ss.ID, ss.FDYFGZ, ss.GDYFGZ, ss.BT_YH, ss.kc_BX, ss.JJJE, ss.SJSDQJ, ss.SJSDQJ1, ss.GPH, ss.XM, ss.SDQJ, ss.RMB, ss.JFYE, ss.YNSSDE, ss.SL, ss.SSKCS, ss.DKSDS, ss.DKSDS0701

${tAlias}.ID as ${tAlias}_ID, ${tAlias}.FDYFGZ as ${tAlias}_FDYFGZ, ${tAlias}.GDYFGZ as ${tAlias}_GDYFGZ, ${tAlias}.BT_YH as ${tAlias}_BT_YH, ${tAlias}.kc_BX as ${tAlias}_kc_BX, ${tAlias}.JJJE as ${tAlias}_JJJE, ${tAlias}.SJSDQJ as ${tAlias}_SJSDQJ, ${tAlias}.SJSDQJ1 as ${tAlias}_SJSDQJ1, ${tAlias}.GPH as ${tAlias}_GPH, ${tAlias}.XM as ${tAlias}_XM, ${tAlias}.SDQJ as ${tAlias}_SDQJ, ${tAlias}.RMB as ${tAlias}_RMB, ${tAlias}.JFYE as ${tAlias}_JFYE, ${tAlias}.YNSSDE as ${tAlias}_YNSSDE, ${tAlias}.SL as ${tAlias}_SL, ${tAlias}.SSKCS as ${tAlias}_SSKCS, ${tAlias}.DKSDS as ${tAlias}_DKSDS, ${tAlias}.DKSDS0701 as ${tAlias}_DKSDS0701
mapper.insert: insert into swm_salatax (ID, FDYFGZ, GDYFGZ, BT_YH, kc_BX, JJJE, SJSDQJ, SJSDQJ1, GPH, XM, SDQJ, RMB, JFYE, YNSSDE, SL, SSKCS, DKSDS, DKSDS0701) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fdyfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{gdyfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{btYh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcBx,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{jjje,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sjsdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjsdqj1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{jfye,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ynssde,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sl,jdbcType=REAL}, #{sskcs,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dksds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dksds0701,jdbcType=DECIMAL})
mapper.update: update swm_salatax set ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FDYFGZ = #{fdyfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, GDYFGZ = #{gdyfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BT_YH = #{btYh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, kc_BX = #{kcBx,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, JJJE = #{jjje,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SJSDQJ = #{sjsdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SJSDQJ1 = #{sjsdqj1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GPH = #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, XM = #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SDQJ = #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RMB = #{rmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, JFYE = #{jfye,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, YNSSDE = #{ynssde,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SL = #{sl,jdbcType=REAL}, SSKCS = #{sskcs,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, DKSDS = #{dksds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, DKSDS0701 = #{dksds0701,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.select:
select
from swm_salatax ss where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( ss.GPH ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and left(ss.SDQJ, 4) = #{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ss.SDQJ
